blended.narrative: Tuckerman Ravine is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,365 ft. Looking ahead, 40 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 60 mph may cause lift holds.
